body:
This is the final version of our attempts to add an Anelastic constructor with minimal changes in the Repo.
We are adding a new Phase_type 'AnelasticPhaseEquil'
A new constructor 'AnelasticPhaseEquil_pθq'
A new saturation adjustment 'saturation_adjustment_given_pθq_anelastic'
A new method 'PhasePartition_equil_given_p'
And liquid_fraction now dispatches the to see if liquid fraction is 1 (liquid only) for the 'AnelasticPhaseEquil'
We dispatch 'air_pressure' to return the input (hydrostatic or grid mean) pressure.
title: Add pressure to ts and make PhaseEquil_pθq more consistent
